title: eupatorium bohlmannianum
intro: Eupatorium bohlmannianum, also known as Bohlmann's eupatorium, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The medicinal properties of Eupatorium bohlmannianum have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and it has been used to treat conditions such as arthritis and muscle spasms. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion, and it can also be used in topical applications to relieve pain and inflammation.
